title: Recent major updates to the GetSign app for easier document generation and sending documents
excerpt: GetSign, our document signing app now has a brand-new interface focused on clarity, speed, and control. Whether you’re generating agreements, collecting signatures, or automating approvals—everything is now simpler and m…

posts.author: randhirjetpack (Randhir Chaudhary)
posts.cookedHtml:
GetSign, our document signing app now has a brand-new interface focused on clarity, speed, and control. Whether you’re generating agreements, collecting signatures, or automating approvals—everything is now simpler and more intuitive.

Watch what’s new in GetSign:

GetSign

Discover new updates in GetSign App on monday.com - GetSign

The new updates in GetSign app for monday.com brings a powerful, intuitive, and flexible way to manage document signing workflows.

What’s new:

A streamlined layout with five smart sections
Easier document generation via status triggers
One-click signing links for single signers
Built-in payment field right inside the editor
Track signature status without leaving your board

This update is live for all new boards where you install GetSign. And don’t worry—existing boards will continue to use the current setup with no disruption.

We’d love to hear your thoughts! If you’ve been using GetSign, tell us which feature you’re most excited about—or what you’d like to see next.

posts.author: andrew92 (Andrew Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Loving the new updates! The new layout is super clean and way easier to navigate. Really like how we can now handle templates and automations without jumping through so many hoops.

Also appreciate that the older boards still work the same—that made the switch way less stressful. Nice job team
